creator: debdrup@freebsd.org
text:
PauAmma, a long time FreeBSD user and docs contributor, has been helping me with quarterly status reports for the past many moons, so it'd be nice if he could commit his own changes to the quarterly reports repo similar to how I got started on the quarterly repo (and papers repo) - the repo in question is https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-quarterly

Username is https://github.com/pauamma and in case the email is necessary, it's pauamma@gundo.com
